# Work Report (2026-05-01 to 2026-05-05)

*Autogenerated by TaskLedger*

## 🦀 Things I've been working on

- **[CNTRLPLANE-3070: Support KMS on self-managed Azure without affecting ARO HCP](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-3070)**
  - Added self-managed Azure KMS encryption support with workload identity, CEL validation, CLI support, CPO implementation, e2e tests, and documentation
  - Addressed CodeRabbit review feedback on CEL rules and test patterns
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8088

- **[CNTRLPLANE-3204: Add workload identity support to the Azure KMS plugin provider](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-3204)**
  - Added workload identity support to Azure KMS plugin
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/azure-kubernetes-kms/pull/33

- **[CNTRLPLANE-3222: Migrate self-managed Azure e2e tests to v2 Ginkgo framework](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-3222)**
  - Pushed fix for HO informer cache timing issue in KAS CIDRs e2e test
  - Tested Azure v2 self-managed CI job config, skipped failing test pending upstream fix
  - Removed hypershift-analyze-e2e-failure step from v2 self-managed workflow to fix ImagePullBackOff failures
  - Pushed Azure v2 self-managed e2e workflow and CI job configuration
  - Migrated self-managed Azure e2e tests from v1 to v2 Ginkgo framework
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8204, https://github.com/openshift/release/pull/77674

- **[CNTRLPLANE-3314: Unify registry override and image resolution code behind a single abstraction for human and agent readability](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-3314)**
  - Addressed csrwng's review feedback on unified image resolution enhancement
  - Added image resolution use cases section and split ImageResolver into purpose-specific methods
  - Referenced OCPBUGS-44470 as validation of dual-resolver invariant
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/enhancements/pull/1981

- **[CNTRLPLANE-3324: Enable gocyclo linter and reduce cyclomatic complexity in HyperShift](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-3324)**
  - Addressed review feedback on complexity refactoring and pinned gocyclo threshold
  - Added unit tests for HCP deletion, private link, and infra cluster network
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8309

- **[CNTRLPLANE-3343: Extract support/k8sutil package from support/util](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-3343)**
  - Extracted support/k8sutil package from support/util with generic Kubernetes resource helpers
  - Updated control-plane-operator and e2e callers to use new package
  - Addressed jparrill's review comments on k8sutil package extraction
  - Merged PR
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8396

- **[CNTRLPLANE-3351: e2e: add CPU resource request overrides for control plane components](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-3351)**
  - Merged PR: e2e: add opt-in CPU resource request overrides for control plane components
  - Merged PR: enable CPU resource request overrides for Azure self-managed e2e
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8385

- **[CNTRLPLANE-3352: Migrate GHA workflows to reusable workflows to eliminate verify-workflows Prow job](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-3352)**
  - Cancelled hold and discussed workflow testing approach with cblecker
  - Merged PRs converting GHA callers to reusable workflows and removing verify-workflows Prow job
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/release/pull/78674

- **[CNTRLPLANE-3358: Sync openshift/azure-kubernetes-kms fork with upstream Azure/kubernetes-kms](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-3358)**
  - Bumped security packages to resolve grpc, x/net, x/crypto, and otel CVEs
  - Downgraded deps to go 1.24 compat and fixed pre-existing vet error
  - Verified by e2e and merged upstream sync PR
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/azure-kubernetes-kms/pull/32

- **[CNTRLPLANE-3370: Add Jira comment explaining why not-ready-to-solve label was applied](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-3370)**
  - Added Jira result comment feature to ready-to-solve skill
  - Addressed review feedback from enxebre and CodeRabbit
  - Merged PR
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift-eng/ai-helpers/pull/440

- **[OCPBUGS-84969: Karpenter e2e billing vCPU test flakes at 50% rate due to stale NodeClaims from parallel tests](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-84969)**
  - Fixed Karpenter e2e flake by waiting for node cleanup in parallel tests
  - Confirmed fix with e2e-aws results, merged PR
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8414

- **[OCPBUGS-84971: AWSDefaultSecurityGroupDeleted condition appears on non-AWS HostedClusters during deletion](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-84971)**
  - Fixed AWSDefaultSecurityGroupDeleted condition being set on non-AWS clusters during deletion
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8415
